title: Create: New Copper Stuffs
description: This pack brings Create's new copper texture to the old version!
body:
This Resource Pack Brings Create's New Copper Textures to 0.5.1, Including Scaffoldings, All fluid items, copper shingles, and a whole lot more to the New Copper Textures! If you thought that the new textures were good, you can use this pack to get all the new copper texture changes in old Create! (forge only)

Also check out:
[Create: Old Copper Stuffs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-old-copper-stuffs)
